subject: Alpha Project Delay Cause Explanation
body:
Manager Wang,

Main reasons for the Alpha project delay:
1. Third-party API approval was delayed by 2 weeks
2. Front-end integration testing found 15 blocking bugs
3. Client changed 3 requirements mid-project

Suggest focusing on the change management process during the retrospective.

Li Na

subject: Alpha Project Technical Debt Summary
body:
Manager Wang,

Technical issues:
1. Unit test coverage is only 45% (target was 80%)
2. 3 critical modules have no API documentation
3. Deployment script is not automated enough, each release requires 12 manual steps

Suggest discussing CI/CD improvement plans during the retrospective.

Zhang Wei

subject: Re: Alpha Project Delivery Feedback
body:
Manager Wang,

Overall satisfaction: 7/10. Some feedback:
1. System performance met expectations
2. However, delivery was delayed by 3 weeks, which impacted our launch plan
3. Hope future projects can better manage changes

Mr. Zhao

subject: Next Month Social Insurance Notice
body: Everyone, the social insurance contribution base will be adjusted next month.
